creator: gemiel@gmail.com
text:
On Oct 14, 2008, at 2:43 PM, Stefan Walter wrote:

> Hi Emiel,
>
> the port audio/musicpd has been updated in the meantime. Can you still
> reproduce the problem you reported with the new version?
>
> I have also cc'd the port's maintainer - the initial automatic
> notification about this PR was sent to the wrong person.

Hello Stefan,

Thanks for the update. I portupgraded everything this evening and  
unfortunately
I'm still seeing the WARNING message under 'dmesg'. Please let me know  
if I can
provide any additional information.

Thanks!

  - Emiel

-- 

mad% date
Tue Oct 14 23:55:27 CEST 2008

mad% uname -a
FreeBSD mad.localdomain 7.1-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 7.1-PRERELEASE #0: Wed  
Sep 24 16:11:43 CEST 2008     root@mad.localdomain:/usr/obj/usr/src/ 
sys/GENERIC  amd64

mad% pkg_info | grep musicpd
mpc-0.12.1          Command line client for the musicpd
musicpd-0.13.2      A remote-controllable music-daemon

mad% pgrep mpd
44571
44570
44569

mad% sudo /usr/local/etc/rc.d/musicpd stop
Stopping musicpd.
kill: 44570: No such process
kill: 44571: No such process

mad% dmesg | tail
WARNING pid 56069 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005
WARNING pid 56092 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045006
WARNING pid 56092 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045002
WARNING pid 56092 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005
WARNING pid 44549 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045006
WARNING pid 44549 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045002
WARNING pid 44549 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005
WARNING pid 44570 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045006
WARNING pid 44570 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045002
WARNING pid 44570 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005

mad% sudo /usr/local/etc/rc.d/musicpd start
Starting musicpd.

mad% pgrep mpd
44595
44594
44593

mad% dmesg | tail
WARNING pid 56092 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005
WARNING pid 44549 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045006
WARNING pid 44549 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045002
WARNING pid 44549 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005
WARNING pid 44570 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045006

WARNING pid 44570 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005
